---
title: "log_likelihood"
generated: true
description: "Per-element maximised log-likelihood."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:log_likelihood -->
```python
log_likelihood(result: GLMResult) -> Float[Array, 'V']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:log_likelihood -->
Per-element maximised log-likelihood.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:log_likelihood -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `result` | `GLMResult` | — | — | A fitted [`GLMResult`](../nitrix-stats-glm/GLMResult.qmd) carrying the stored maximised log-likelihood. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `V`. `(V,)` maximised log-likelihood, one per element.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:log_likelihood -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
